provider_secrets.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
provider_secrets.purpose: Production billing, Checkout Sessions, portal, and reconciliation
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Create or roll a live restricted Stripe key, update GitHub/Coolify/Hetzner secret stores, then disable the old key after verification.

provider_secrets.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Create a replacement webhook signing secret, deploy it to every runtime that receives Stripe webhooks, verify delivery, then retire the old endpoint secret.

provider_secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
provider_secrets.purpose: Cloudflare Pages deploys and DNS/security automation
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Create a least-privilege Cloudflare token, update GitHub Actions and deployment hosts, verify Pages deploy, then revoke the old token.

provider_secrets.name: HETZNER_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Install a new deploy public key on the target server, update secret stores with the matching private key, test SSH, then remove the old public key.

provider_secrets.name: DATABASE_URL
provider_secrets.purpose: Production database access for migrations and audits
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Rotate the database user password through the database provider, update runtime secrets, verify migrations and health checks, then revoke old credentials.

provider_secrets.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Use the documented re-encryption runbook before replacing this key. Do not rotate blindly.

provider_secrets.name: LICENSE_ADMIN_TOKEN
provider_secrets.purpose: License administration and nightly integrity checks
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Mint a new license admin token with admin-only scope, update jobs and runtime secrets, verify the license audit job, then revoke the old token.

provider_secrets.name: R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID
provider_secrets.purpose: R2 artifact, SBOM, package, and evidence uploads
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Create a new R2 access key pair, update both key ID and secret, run an upload smoke test, then disable the old pair.

provider_secrets.name: R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
provider_secrets.purpose: R2 artifact, SBOM, package, and evidence uploads

provider_secrets.name: RESEND_API_KEY
provider_secrets.purpose: Vendor and regulated buyer email sequences
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Create a new Resend key scoped to sending/webhooks, update runtime secrets, send a test email, then revoke the old key.

provider_secrets.name: MARKETPLACE_AUTOMATION_API_KEY
provider_secrets.purpose: Marketplace automation cron with marketplace-only scope
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Mint a new scoped BYOS key for purpose MARKETPLACE_AUTOMATION, update GitHub/Coolify secrets, verify cron auth, then revoke the old key.

provider_secrets.name: JOB_PROCESSOR_API_KEY
provider_secrets.purpose: Background job processor cron with job-only scope
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Mint a new scoped BYOS key for purpose JOB_PROCESSOR, update GitHub/Coolify secrets, verify cron auth, then revoke the old key.

provider_secrets.name: CI_API_KEY
provider_secrets.purpose: CI smoke tests and model integrity checks
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Mint a new low-scope CI key, update GitHub Actions, run route/model checks, then revoke the old key.

provider_secrets.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Create a new project-scoped OpenAI key, update runtime secrets, run a provider smoke test, then revoke the old key.

provider_secrets.name: GROQ_API_KEY
provider_secrets.rotation_action: Create a new Groq key, update runtime secrets, run fallback smoke test, then revoke the old key.

database_api_keys.rotation_action: Rotate stale workspace API keys through the Vault/API-key service. No broad owner key should be used by automated workers.
